query: SELECT * FROM slaves;

SELECT
    time_bucket('15 minutes', timestamp) AS bucket,
    SUM(value) AS total_value
FROM
    consumption_realtime
WHERE
    slave_id = {{ msg.slave_id }}
    AND timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 month'
    AND timestamp <= NOW()
GROUP BY
    bucket
ORDER BY
    bucket;

SELECT
    time_bucket('1 day', timestamp) AS day,
    SUM(value) / 1000 AS total_consumption_kwh
FROM (
    SELECT
        time_bucket('1 hour', timestamp) AS timestamp,
        AVG(value) AS value
    FROM
        consumption_realtime
    WHERE
        slave_id = {{ msg.req.params.slave_id }}
        AND timestamp
    BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
        AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
    GROUP BY
        time_bucket('1 hour', timestamp)
) AS hourly_data
GROUP BY
    day
ORDER BY
    total_consumption_kwh ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
    time_bucket('1 day', timestamp) AS day,
    MIN(min_hourly_value) AS min_daily_demand,
    MAX(max_hourly_value) AS max_daily_demand
FROM (
    SELECT
        time_bucket('1 hour', timestamp) AS timestamp,
        MIN(value) AS min_hourly_value,
        MAX(value) AS max_hourly_value
    FROM
        consumption_realtime
    WHERE
        slave_id = {{ msg.req.params.slave_id }}
        AND timestamp
    BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
        AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
    GROUP BY
        time_bucket('1 hour', timestamp)
) AS hourly_data
GROUP BY
    day
ORDER BY
    day;

WITH hourly_data AS (
    SELECT
        slave_id,
        time_bucket('1 hour', timestamp) AS hour,
        AVG(value) AS avg_value
    FROM
        consumption_realtime
    WHERE
        slave_id = {{ msg.req.params.slave_id }}
        AND timestamp <= TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
    GROUP BY
        slave_id, hour
),
cumulative_sum AS (
    SELECT
        slave_id,
        hour,
        avg_value,
        SUM(avg_value) OVER (PARTITION BY slave_id ORDER BY hour) AS running_total
    FROM
        hourly_data
)
SELECT
    slave_id,
    MAX(running_total) / 1000 AS total_consumption_kwh
FROM
    cumulative_sum
GROUP BY
    slave_id;

WITH hourly_data AS (
    SELECT
        slave_id,
        time_bucket('1 hour', timestamp) AS hour,
        AVG(value) AS hourly_avg
    FROM
        consumption_realtime
    WHERE
        slave_id = ANY(ARRAY[{{msg.req.params.slave_ids}}])
        AND timestamp
    BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
        AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
    GROUP BY
        slave_id, hour
)
SELECT
    slave_id,
    SUM(hourly_avg) / 1000 AS total_consumption_kwh
FROM
    hourly_data
GROUP BY
    slave_id
ORDER BY
    slave_id;

WITH hourly_data AS (
    SELECT
        slave_id,
        time_bucket('1 hour', timestamp) AS hour,
        AVG(value) AS avg_value
    FROM
        consumption_realtime
    WHERE
        slave_id = ANY(ARRAY[{{msg.req.params.slave_ids}}])
        AND timestamp <= TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
    GROUP BY
        slave_id, hour
),
cumulative_sum AS (
    SELECT
        slave_id,
        hour,
        avg_value,
        SUM(avg_value) OVER (PARTITION BY slave_id ORDER BY hour) AS running_total
    FROM
        hourly_data
)
SELECT
    slave_id,
    MAX(running_total) / 1000 AS total_consumption_kwh
FROM
    cumulative_sum
GROUP BY
    slave_id
ORDER BY
    slave_id;

WITH hourly_data AS (
    SELECT
        slave_id,
        time_bucket('1 hour', timestamp) AS hour,
        MIN(value) AS min_hourly_value,
        MAX(value) AS max_hourly_value
    FROM
        consumption_realtime
    WHERE
        slave_id = ANY(ARRAY[{{msg.req.params.slave_ids}}])
        AND timestamp
    BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
        AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
    GROUP BY
        slave_id, hour
)
SELECT
    slave_id,
    MIN(min_hourly_value) AS absolute_min_demand,
    MAX(max_hourly_value) AS absolute_max_demand,
    (SELECT hour FROM hourly_data h2 WHERE h2.slave_id = h1.slave_id AND h2.min_hourly_value = MIN(h1.min_hourly_value) LIMIT 1) AS min_demand_hour,
    (SELECT hour FROM hourly_data h2 WHERE h2.slave_id = h1.slave_id AND h2.max_hourly_value = MAX(h1.max_hourly_value) LIMIT 1) AS max_demand_hour
FROM 
    hourly_data h1
GROUP BY
    slave_id
ORDER BY
    slave_id;

query:
SELECT
    slave_id,
    EXTRACT(DOW FROM timestamp) AS weekday,
    AVG(value) / 1000 AS avg_consumption_kwh
FROM
    consumption_realtime
WHERE
    slave_id = ANY(ARRAY[{{msg.req.params.slave_ids}}])
    AND timestamp
BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
    AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
GROUP BY
    slave_id, weekday
ORDER BY
    slave_id, weekday;

SELECT
    slave_id,
    DATE(timestamp) AS day,
    SUM(value) / 1000 AS total_consumption_kwh
FROM
    consumption_realtime
WHERE
    slave_id = ANY(ARRAY[{{ msg.req.params.slave_ids }}])
    AND timestamp
BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
    AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
GROUP BY
    slave_id, day
HAVING
    SUM(value) = (
        SELECT MAX(daily_consumption)
        FROM (
            SELECT slave_id, DATE(timestamp) AS day, SUM(value) AS daily_consumption
            FROM consumption_realtime
            WHERE slave_id = ANY(ARRAY[{{ msg.req.params.slave_ids }}])
                AND timestamp
            BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
                AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
            GROUP BY slave_id, DATE(timestamp)
        ) AS daily_totals
        WHERE daily_totals.slave_id = consumption_realtime.slave_id
    )
ORDER BY
    slave_id, total_consumption_kwh DESC;

SELECT
    slave_id,
    EXTRACT(DOW FROM timestamp) AS weekday,
    SUM(value) / 1000 AS total_consumption_kwh
FROM
    consumption_realtime
WHERE
    slave_id = ANY(ARRAY[{{ msg.req.params.slave_ids }}])
    AND timestamp
BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
    AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
GROUP BY
    slave_id, weekday
HAVING
    SUM(value) = (
        SELECT MAX(weekly_consumption)
        FROM (
            SELECT slave_id, EXTRACT(DOW FROM timestamp) AS weekday, SUM(value) AS weekly_consumption
            FROM consumption_realtime
            WHERE slave_id = ANY(ARRAY[{{ msg.req.params.slave_ids }}])
                AND timestamp
            BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
                AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
            GROUP BY slave_id, EXTRACT(DOW FROM timestamp)
        ) AS weekly_totals
        WHERE weekly_totals.slave_id = consumption_realtime.slave_id
    )
ORDER BY
    slave_id, total_consumption_kwh DESC;

SELECT
    slave_id,
    DATE_TRUNC('hour', timestamp) AS hour,
    SUM(value) / 1000 AS total_consumption_kwh
FROM
    consumption_realtime
WHERE
    slave_id = ANY(ARRAY[{{ msg.req.params.slave_ids }}]::integer[])
    AND timestamp
BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
    AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
GROUP BY
    slave_id, hour
HAVING
    SUM(value) = (
        SELECT MAX(hourly_consumption)
        FROM (
            SELECT slave_id, DATE_TRUNC('hour', timestamp) AS hour, SUM(value) AS hourly_consumption
            FROM consumption_realtime
            WHERE slave_id = ANY(ARRAY[{{ msg.req.params.slave_ids }}]::integer[])
                AND timestamp
            BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
                AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
            GROUP BY slave_id, DATE_TRUNC('hour', timestamp)
        ) AS hourly_totals
        WHERE hourly_totals.slave_id = consumption_realtime.slave_id
    )
ORDER BY
    slave_id, total_consumption_kwh DESC;

SELECT
    slave_id,
    SUM(value) / 1000 AS total_consumption_kwh
FROM (
    SELECT
        slave_id,
        time_bucket('1 hour', timestamp) AS hour,
        AVG(value) AS value
    FROM
        consumption_realtime
    WHERE
        slave_id = {{ msg.req.params.slave_id }}
        AND timestamp
    BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
        AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
    GROUP BY
        slave_id, hour
) AS hourly_data
GROUP BY
    slave_id;

SELECT
    weekday,
    AVG(hourly_consumption) / 1000 AS avg_hourly_consumption_kwh
FROM (
    SELECT
        EXTRACT(DOW FROM time_bucket('1 hour', timestamp)) AS weekday,
        SUM(value) AS hourly_consumption
    FROM
        consumption_realtime
    WHERE
        slave_id = {{ msg.req.params.slave_id }}
        AND timestamp
    BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
        AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
    GROUP BY
        EXTRACT(DOW FROM time_bucket('1 hour', timestamp)),
        time_bucket('1 hour', timestamp)
) AS hourly_data
GROUP BY
    weekday
ORDER BY
    weekday;

SELECT
    time_bucket('1 day', timestamp) AS day,
    SUM(value) / 1000 AS total_consumption_kwh
FROM (
    SELECT
        time_bucket('1 hour', timestamp) AS timestamp,
        AVG(value) AS value
    FROM
        consumption_realtime
    WHERE
        slave_id = {{ msg.req.params.slave_id }}
        AND timestamp
    BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
        AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
    GROUP BY
        time_bucket('1 hour', timestamp)
) AS hourly_data
GROUP BY
    day
ORDER BY
    total_consumption_kwh DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
    EXTRACT(DOW FROM timestamp) AS weekday,
    SUM(value) / 1000 AS total_consumption_kwh
FROM
    consumption_realtime
WHERE
    slave_id = {{ msg.req.params.slave_id }}
    AND timestamp
BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
    AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
GROUP BY
    weekday
ORDER BY
    total_consumption_kwh DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('hour', timestamp) AS hour,
    SUM(value) / 1000 AS total_consumption_kwh
FROM
    consumption_realtime
WHERE
    slave_id = {{ msg.req.params.slave_id }}
    AND timestamp
BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
    AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
GROUP BY
    hour
ORDER BY
    total_consumption_kwh DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
    time_bucket('1 day', timestamp) AS day,
    SUM(value) / 1000 AS total_consumption_kwh
FROM (
    SELECT
        time_bucket('1 hour', timestamp) AS timestamp,
        AVG(value) AS value
    FROM
        consumption_realtime
    WHERE
        slave_id = {{ msg.req.params.slave_id }}
        AND timestamp
    BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
        AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
    GROUP BY
        time_bucket('1 hour', timestamp)
) AS hourly_data
GROUP BY
    day
ORDER BY
    day;

SELECT
    slave_id,
    AVG(hourly_consumption) / 1000 AS avg_hourly_consumption_kwh
FROM (
    SELECT
        slave_id,
        time_bucket('1 hour', timestamp) AS hour,
        SUM(value) AS hourly_consumption
    FROM
        consumption_realtime
    WHERE
        slave_id = {{ msg.req.params.slave_id }}
        AND timestamp
    BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
        AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
    GROUP BY
        slave_id, hour
) AS hourly_data
GROUP BY
    slave_id;

query:
SELECT
    time_bucket('1 day', timestamp) AS consumption_date,               
    SUM(value) / 1000 AS total_consumption_kwh, 
    COUNT(DISTINCT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp)) AS total_hours, 
    (SUM(value) / 1000) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp)), 0) AS hours_per_kwh
FROM
    consumption_realtime
WHERE
    name = {{ msg.req.params.device }}              
    AND timestamp BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
        AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000) 
GROUP BY
    consumption_date                       
ORDER BY
    consumption_date;

SELECT
    time_bucket('1 day', timestamp) AS day,  
	MAX(value)/1000 AS max_consumption,
	MIN(value)/1000 AS min_consumption,
    SUM(value)/1000 AS total_consumption_kwh, 
    COUNT(DISTINCT date_trunc('hour', timestamp)) AS total_hours, 
    (SUM(value) / 1000) / COUNT(DISTINCT date_trunc('hour', timestamp)) AS hours_per_kwh
FROM
    consumption_realtime
WHERE         
    timestamp BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
        AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000) 
GROUP BY
    time_bucket('1 day', timestamp)                       
ORDER BY
    day;

name: Add namespace

query:
SELECT
   day,
   SUM(value * delta_t_hours) / 1000 AS total_consumption_kwh
FROM (
   SELECT
       time_bucket('1 day', timestamp) AS day,
       value,
       EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (timestamp - LAG(timestamp) OVER (PARTITION BY slave_id ORDER BY timestamp))) / 3600 AS delta_t_hours
   FROM
       consumption_realtime
   WHERE
  timestamp BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
       AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000) 
) AS subquery
GROUP BY
   day
ORDER BY
   day;

SELECT
   day,
   SUM(value) AS total_consumption_liters
FROM (
   SELECT
       time_bucket('1 day', timestamp) AS day,
       value
   FROM
       channel_pulse_log
   WHERE
        timestamp BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
            AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000) 
) AS subquery
GROUP BY
   day
ORDER BY
   day;

Get last 15 minutes
query:
SELECT 
  time_bucket('15 minutes', timestamp) AS quinze_min,
  (AVG(value) * 0.25) AS value_wh,
  slave_id
FROM consumption_realtime
WHERE slave_id = 12
  AND timestamp >= '2024-11-06 00:00:00'
  AND timestamp <= '2024-11-06 23:59:59'
GROUP BY quinze_min, slave_id
ORDER BY quinze_min DESC;

name: Get last 15 minutes
query:
SELECT 
  time_bucket('15 minutes', timestamp) AS quinze_min,
  (AVG(value) * 0.25) AS value_wh,
  slave_id
FROM consumption_realtime
WHERE slave_id IN {{{ msg.payload.devices }}}
  AND timestamp >= '{{{ msg.payload.dateStart }}}'
  AND timestamp < '2025-02-26T03:00:00.000Z'
GROUP BY quinze_min, slave_id
ORDER BY quinze_min DESC;

name: Add namespace

query:
SELECT 
    s.id AS slave_id,
    s.name AS slave_name,
    MAX(cr.timestamp) AS last_reading
FROM 
    slaves s
LEFT JOIN 
    consumption_realtime cr ON s.id = cr.slave_id
WHERE 
    s.type = 'three_phase_sensor'
GROUP BY 
    s.id, s.name
HAVING 
    MAX(cr.timestamp) < NOW() - INTERVAL '72 hours'
    OR MAX(cr.timestamp) IS NULL;

SELECT 
    c.slave_id,
    c.channel,
    c.name AS channel_name,
    s.name AS slave_name,
    MAX(cpl.timestamp) AS last_reading
FROM 
    channels c
LEFT JOIN 
    channel_pulse_log cpl ON c.slave_id = cpl.slave_id AND c.channel = cpl.channel
LEFT JOIN 
    slaves s ON c.slave_id = s.id
WHERE 
    c.name LIKE 'Hidr.%'
  AND c.slave_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    c.slave_id, c.channel, c.name, s.name
HAVING 
    MAX(cpl.timestamp) < NOW() - INTERVAL '72 hours'
    OR MAX(cpl.timestamp) IS NULL;

WITH channel_info AS (
    SELECT
        slave_id,
        name,
        COALESCE(CAST((regexp_match(name, 'x([0-9.]+)'))[1] AS FLOAT), 1) AS multiplier
    FROM
        channels
    WHERE
        slave_id = ANY (ARRAY[{{ msg.payload }}])
        AND channel = 1
),
hourly_metrics AS (
    SELECT
        c.slave_id,
        time_bucket('1 hour', cpl.timestamp) AS consumption_hour,
        SUM(cpl.value) AS hourly_consumption_L
    FROM
        channel_info c
    INNER JOIN
        channel_pulse_log cpl
        ON c.slave_id = cpl.slave_id
        AND cpl.timestamp >= TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
        AND cpl.timestamp < TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
        AND cpl.value >= 0
        AND cpl.channel = 1
    GROUP BY
        c.slave_id, consumption_hour
),
totals_per_slave AS (
    SELECT
        slave_id,
        SUM(hourly_consumption_L) AS total_consumption_L,
        COUNT(DISTINCT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM consumption_hour)) AS active_hours,
        MAX(hourly_consumption_L) AS max_hourly_consumption_L,
        MIN(hourly_consumption_L) AS min_hourly_consumption_L
    FROM
        hourly_metrics
    GROUP BY
        slave_id
),
max_min_hours AS (
    SELECT
        h.slave_id,
        MIN(CASE WHEN h.hourly_consumption_L = d.max_hourly_consumption_L 
                 THEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM h.consumption_hour) END) AS hour_of_max_consumption,
        MIN(CASE WHEN h.hourly_consumption_L = d.min_hourly_consumption_L 
                 THEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM h.consumption_hour) END) AS hour_of_min_consumption
    FROM
        hourly_metrics h
    JOIN
        totals_per_slave d ON h.slave_id = d.slave_id
    GROUP BY
        h.slave_id
)
SELECT
    c.slave_id,
    c.name AS device_name,
    COALESCE(d.total_consumption_L, 0) AS total_consumption_L,
    c.multiplier,
    (COALESCE(d.total_consumption_L, 0) * c.multiplier) / 1000 AS total_consumption_m3,
    COALESCE(d.active_hours, 0) AS active_hours,
    COALESCE(d.max_hourly_consumption_L, 0) AS max_hourly_consumption_L,
    COALESCE(d.min_hourly_consumption_L, 0) AS min_hourly_consumption_L,
    m.hour_of_max_consumption,
    m.hour_of_min_consumption
FROM
    channel_info c
LEFT JOIN
    totals_per_slave d ON c.slave_id = d.slave_id
LEFT JOIN
    max_min_hours m ON c.slave_id = m.slave_id
ORDER BY
    total_consumption_m3 DESC;

WITH hourly_metrics AS (
    SELECT
        slave_id,
        time_bucket('1 hour', timestamp) AS consumption_hour,
        SUM(value) AS hourly_consumption_L
    FROM
        channel_pulse_log
    WHERE
        slave_id = ANY (ARRAY[{{ msg.payload }}])
        AND timestamp BETWEEN 
            TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
            AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
        AND value >= 0
    GROUP BY
        slave_id, consumption_hour
),
totals_per_slave AS (
    SELECT
        slave_id,
        SUM(hourly_consumption_L) AS total_consumption_L,
        COUNT(DISTINCT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM consumption_hour)) AS active_hours,
        MAX(hourly_consumption_L) AS max_hourly_consumption_L,
        MIN(hourly_consumption_L) AS min_hourly_consumption_L
    FROM
        hourly_metrics
    GROUP BY
        slave_id
),
max_min_hours AS (
    SELECT
        h.slave_id,
        MAX(CASE WHEN h.hourly_consumption_L = d.max_hourly_consumption_L 
                 THEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM (h.consumption_hour AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')) END) AS hour_of_max_consumption,
        MIN(CASE WHEN h.hourly_consumption_L = d.min_hourly_consumption_L 
                 THEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM (h.consumption_hour AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')) END) AS hour_of_min_consumption
    FROM
        hourly_metrics h
    JOIN
        totals_per_slave d ON h.slave_id = d.slave_id
    GROUP BY
        h.slave_id
)
SELECT
    d.slave_id,
    s.name AS device_name,
    d.total_consumption_L,
    d.active_hours,
    ROUND(d.total_consumption_L / NULLIF(d.active_hours, 0)::numeric, 2) AS avg_L_per_hour,
    d.max_hourly_consumption_L,
    d.min_hourly_consumption_L,
    m.hour_of_max_consumption,
    m.hour_of_min_consumption
FROM
    totals_per_slave d
LEFT JOIN
    max_min_hours m ON d.slave_id = m.slave_id
JOIN
    slaves s ON s.id = d.slave_id
ORDER BY
    d.slave_id;

WITH hourly_metrics AS (
    SELECT
        c.slave_id,
        time_bucket('1 day', cpl.timestamp, INTERVAL '3 hours') AS consumption_date,
        time_bucket('1 hour', cpl.timestamp) AS consumption_hour,
        SUM(cpl.value) AS hourly_consumption_L,
        COALESCE(CAST((regexp_match(c.name, 'x([0-9.]+)'))[1] AS FLOAT), 1) AS multiplier
    FROM
        channels c
    LEFT JOIN
        channel_pulse_log cpl
        ON c.slave_id = cpl.slave_id
        AND cpl.timestamp >= TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
        AND cpl.timestamp < TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
        AND cpl.value >= 0
        AND cpl.channel = 1
    WHERE
        c.slave_id = {{ msg.payload }}
        AND c.channel = 1
    GROUP BY
        c.slave_id, c.name, consumption_date, consumption_hour
),
daily_metrics AS (
    SELECT
        consumption_date,
        SUM(hourly_consumption_L * multiplier) / 1000 AS total_consumption_m3,
        COUNT(DISTINCT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM consumption_hour)) AS active_hours,
        MAX(hourly_consumption_L * multiplier) / 1000 AS max_hourly_consumption_m3,
        MIN(hourly_consumption_L * multiplier) / 1000 AS min_hourly_consumption_m3,
        multiplier
    FROM
        hourly_metrics
    GROUP BY
        consumption_date, multiplier
),
max_min_hours AS (
    SELECT
        h.consumption_date,
        MAX(CASE WHEN (h.hourly_consumption_L * h.multiplier) / 1000 = d.max_hourly_consumption_m3 
                 THEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM h.consumption_hour) END) AS hour_of_max_consumption,
        MIN(CASE WHEN (h.hourly_consumption_L * h.multiplier) / 1000 = d.min_hourly_consumption_m3 
                 THEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM h.consumption_hour) END) AS hour_of_min_consumption
    FROM
        hourly_metrics h
    JOIN
        daily_metrics d
    ON
        h.consumption_date = d.consumption_date
    GROUP BY
        h.consumption_date
)
SELECT
    to_char(d.consumption_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.MS"Z"') AS consumption_date,
    ROUND(d.total_consumption_m3::numeric, 2) AS total_consumption_m3,
    d.active_hours,
    ROUND((d.total_consumption_m3 / NULLIF(d.active_hours, 0))::numeric, 2) AS avg_m3_per_hour,
    ROUND(d.max_hourly_consumption_m3::numeric, 2) AS max_hourly_consumption_m3,
    ROUND(d.min_hourly_consumption_m3::numeric, 2) AS min_hourly_consumption_m3,
    m.hour_of_max_consumption,
    m.hour_of_min_consumption
FROM
    daily_metrics d
LEFT JOIN
    max_min_hours m
ON
    d.consumption_date = m.consumption_date
WHERE
    d.consumption_date >= TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
    AND d.consumption_date < TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
ORDER BY
    d.consumption_date;

WITH hourly_metrics AS (
    SELECT
        time_bucket('1 day', timestamp) AS consumption_date,
        time_bucket('1 hour', timestamp) AS consumption_hour,
        SUM(value) AS hourly_consumption_L
    FROM
        channel_pulse_log
    WHERE
        timestamp BETWEEN 
            TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
            AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
        AND value >= 0
    GROUP BY
        consumption_date, consumption_hour
),
daily_metrics AS (
    SELECT
        consumption_date,
        SUM(hourly_consumption_L) AS total_consumption_L,
        COUNT(DISTINCT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM consumption_hour)) AS active_hours,
        MAX(hourly_consumption_L) AS max_hourly_consumption_L,
        MIN(hourly_consumption_L) AS min_hourly_consumption_L
    FROM
        hourly_metrics
    GROUP BY
        consumption_date
),
max_min_hours AS (
    SELECT
        h.consumption_date,
        MAX(CASE WHEN h.hourly_consumption_L = d.max_hourly_consumption_L 
                 THEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM (h.consumption_hour AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')) END) AS hour_of_max_consumption,
        MIN(CASE WHEN h.hourly_consumption_L = d.min_hourly_consumption_L 
                 THEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM (h.consumption_hour AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')) END) AS hour_of_min_consumption
    FROM
        hourly_metrics h
    JOIN
        daily_metrics d
    ON
        h.consumption_date = d.consumption_date
    GROUP BY
        h.consumption_date
)
SELECT
    d.consumption_date,
    d.total_consumption_L,
    d.active_hours,
    ROUND(d.total_consumption_L / NULLIF(d.active_hours, 0)::numeric, 2) AS avg_L_per_hour,
    d.max_hourly_consumption_L,
    d.min_hourly_consumption_L,
    m.hour_of_max_consumption,
    m.hour_of_min_consumption
FROM
    daily_metrics d
LEFT JOIN
    max_min_hours m
ON
    d.consumption_date = m.consumption_date
ORDER BY
    d.consumption_date;

SELECT TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000) AS endTs,
       TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000) AS startTs;

SELECT
  time_bucket('5 minutes', cr.timestamp)    AS timestamp,
  cr.slave_id,
  AVG(cr.value)          AS value,
  AVG(cr.value_reactive) AS value_reactive
FROM consumption_realtime cr
JOIN slaves s
  ON cr.slave_id = s.id
WHERE
      -- start *after* the bucket containing last_ts
      cr.timestamp >  ('{{{ msg.payload.last_energy_ts }}}'::timestamptz
                       + INTERVAL '5 minutes')
  AND cr.timestamp <= ('{{{ msg.payload.last_energy_ts }}}'::timestamptz
                       + INTERVAL '1 hour')
  AND (cr.value / 3.0) <= (
    CASE COALESCE(s.clamp_type::text, '0')
      WHEN '0' THEN 50
      WHEN '1' THEN 100
      WHEN '2' THEN 400
      WHEN '3' THEN 1000
      WHEN '4' THEN 2000
      WHEN '5' THEN 1600
      WHEN '6' THEN 1000
      ELSE 0
    END * 220
  )
GROUP BY timestamp, cr.slave_id
ORDER BY timestamp, cr.slave_id;

name: function 11

query:
WITH raw_ts AS (
  -- 1) use exactly what the cloud sent, or fall back to the first 2023+ reading
  SELECT
    COALESCE(
      NULLIF('{{{ msg.payload.last_water_ts }}}','')::timestamptz,
      (
        SELECT MIN(timestamp)
          FROM channel_pulse_log
         WHERE timestamp > '2025-01-01T00:00:00Z'
           AND channel   = 1
      )
    ) AS start_ts
),
channel_info AS (
  -- 2) lookup your per-slave multiplier
  SELECT
    slave_id,
    MAX(
      COALESCE(
        (regexp_match(name, 'x([0-9]+\\.?[0-9]*)'))[1]::float,
        1
      )
    ) AS multiplier
  FROM channels
  WHERE channel = 1
    AND type    = 'flow_sensor'
    AND slave_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY slave_id
),
bounds AS (
  -- 3) from that start_ts, either take a full hour (if there's data),
  --    or jump to the end of the very next non‐empty 5m bucket
  SELECT
    r.start_ts,
    CASE
      WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
          FROM channel_pulse_log c
          JOIN channel_info ci ON c.slave_id = ci.slave_id
         WHERE c.timestamp >  r.start_ts
           AND c.timestamp <= r.start_ts + INTERVAL '1 hour'
           AND c.channel   = 1
           AND c.value     > 0
           AND c.value     < 10000
      )
      THEN r.start_ts + INTERVAL '1 hour'
      ELSE (
        SELECT MIN(time_bucket('5 minutes', c2.timestamp) + INTERVAL '5 minutes')
          FROM channel_pulse_log c2
          JOIN channel_info ci2 ON c2.slave_id = ci2.slave_id
         WHERE c2.timestamp > r.start_ts
           AND c2.channel   = 1
           AND c2.value     > 0
           AND c2.value     < 10000
      )
    END AS end_ts
  FROM raw_ts r
),
main_data AS (
  -- 4) aggregate _all_ pulses in that (start_ts, end_ts] window
  SELECT
    time_bucket('5 minutes', c.timestamp)  AS bucket_start,
    c.slave_id,
    SUM(c.value)                            AS sum_value,
    (SUM(c.value) * ci.multiplier) / 1000   AS value
  FROM channel_pulse_log c
  JOIN channel_info    ci ON c.slave_id = ci.slave_id
  JOIN bounds          b  ON TRUE
  WHERE
        c.timestamp >  b.start_ts
    AND c.timestamp <= b.end_ts
    AND c.channel   = 1
    AND c.value     > 0
    AND c.value     < 10000
  GROUP BY bucket_start, c.slave_id, ci.multiplier
)
-- 5) return exactly one row _and_ use end_ts as the returned timestamp
SELECT
  (SELECT end_ts FROM bounds) AS timestamp,
  slave_id,
  sum_value,
  value,
  1                            AS channel
FROM main_data
ORDER BY timestamp DESC, slave_id
LIMIT 1;

query:
WITH LastTimestamp AS (
  SELECT MAX(timestamp) AS max_timestamp
  FROM channel_pulse_log
),
TimeDiff AS (
  SELECT
    timestamp,
    channel,
    value,
    slave_id,
    reading,
    LAG(timestamp) OVER (PARTITION BY slave_id, channel ORDER BY timestamp) AS prev_timestamp,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (timestamp - LAG(timestamp) OVER (PARTITION BY slave_id, channel ORDER BY timestamp))) AS time_diff_seconds
  FROM channel_pulse_log
  WHERE
    channel = 1
    AND timestamp >= (SELECT max_timestamp - INTERVAL '30 minutes' FROM LastTimestamp)
    AND timestamp <= (SELECT max_timestamp FROM LastTimestamp)
),
Outliers AS (
  SELECT
    timestamp,
    channel,
    value,
    slave_id,
    reading,
    time_diff_seconds,
    (time_diff_seconds * 3) AS max_allowable_value
  FROM TimeDiff
  WHERE
    value > (time_diff_seconds * 3)
    AND value > 10
),
UpdatedRows AS (
  UPDATE channel_pulse_log cpl
  SET value = 0
  FROM Outliers
  WHERE
    cpl.timestamp = Outliers.timestamp
    AND cpl.slave_id = Outliers.slave_id
    AND cpl.channel = Outliers.channel
    AND cpl.value = Outliers.value
    AND cpl.reading = Outliers.reading
  RETURNING cpl.slave_id
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS affected_rows,
  ARRAY_AGG(slave_id) AS affected_slave_ids
FROM UpdatedRows;

SELECT
    slave_id,
    avg_value,
    TO_CHAR(period, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.MS"Z"') AS period
FROM (
    SELECT
        slave_id,
        AVG(value) AS avg_value,
        time_bucket('15 minutes', timestamp) AS period
    FROM consumption_realtime
    WHERE
        slave_id IN ({{msg.payload.id}})
        AND timestamp BETWEEN '{{msg.payload.start}}' AND '{{msg.payload.end}}'
    GROUP BY
        slave_id,
        period
) bucketed
ORDER BY period DESC

[$raw] : [];	                      (	                      $value:=$count($values) > 0 ? (	                                  $rule.aggregation = "AVG" ? $average($values) :	                                  $rule.aggregation = "MIN" ? $min($values) :	                                  $rule.aggregation = "MAX" ? $max($values) :	                                  $rule.aggregation = "SUM" ? $sum($values) :	                                  $rule.aggregation = "COUNT" ? $count($values) :	                                  $values[0]	                              ) : "No data";	                      	                        $mytrig:=$type($value)="number"? and ($value < $rule.value or $value > $valeH))	                                      )	                                    )	                                    :	                                    (	                                        $type($old.triggered) = "boolean" ?	                                        $old.triggered :	                                        false                      $value	                              }	                          }	                      	                      )	                  )	              }) ~> $merge()	          )	      }	  )

(	                                $aux:=$lookup($value[$va.channel], (	                                    $contains($lookup($v.metric), 'ensor')?	                                        'input'	                                    :	                                        'output'	                                ) );	                                $contains($lookup($v.metric), 'oor')?	                                    $aux=0	                                    :	                                    $aux>0	                                )	                            :	                                false	                            	                }	            }	            )	        })	    }	    )	})]~>$merge()	)

(	      $checkOp := function($op, $val, $threshold, $high){	          ($op = "GT" and $val > $threshold) or	          ($op = "GTE" and $val >= $threshold) or	          ($op = "LT" and $val < $threshold) or	          ($op = "LTE" and $val <= $threshold) or	          ($op = "EQ" and $val = $threshold) or	          ($op = "NEQ" and $val != $threshold) or	          ($op = "BETWEEN" and ($val >= $threshold and $val <= $high)) or	          ($op = "OUTSIDE" and ($val < $threshold or $val > $high))	      };		      $aggregate := function($agg, $vals){	          $agg = "AVG" ? $average($vals) :	          $agg = "MIN" ? $min($vals) :	          $agg = "MAX" ? $max($vals) :	          $agg = "SUM" ? $sum($vals) :	          $agg = "COUNT" ? $count($vals) :	          $vals[0]	      };		      [$each(rules, function($v, $k){	          (	              $oldruledata := $lookup(data, $k);	              $valeH := $type($v.valueHigh) = "number" ? $v.valueHigh : 0;	              $newruledata := $lookup(var, $k);	              (	                  {	                      $k: [$each($v.slaves, function($va, $ka){	                          (	                              $slave := $lookup(slaves, 'sl_'&$ka);	                              $old := $lookup($oldruledata, $va.cloud_id);	                              $oldtrigger:= $type($old.triggered) = "boolean" ?	                                $old.triggered : "Undefined";	                              $slaveStatus := $type($lookup($slave, "status")) = "string" ?	                                  $lookup($slave, "status") : "Undefined";	                              $new := $lookup($newruledata, $ka);	                              $value := $aggregate($v.aggregation, $new.*);	                              $newtrigger:= $type($value) = "number" ?	                                $checkOp($v.operator, $value, $v.value, $valeH)	                                :	                                "Undefined";		                              {	                                $va.cloud_id:	                                {	                                    "value":$type($value) = "number"?	                                        $round($value,2) : "Undefined",	                                    "local_id":$ka,	                                    "status": $slaveStatus,	                                    "triggered": $type($newtrigger) = "boolean"?	                                        $newtrigger :	                                        $type($oldtrigger) = "boolean" ?	                                        $oldtrigger : false,	                                    "time": $type($oldtrigger) = "boolean"?	                                        ($oldtrigger = $newtrigger and $type($old.time) = "string"?	                                            $old.time :	                                            $now()	                                        ) :	                                        $now(),	                                    "alldata": $new 	                                }	                              }	                          )	                      })]~>$merge()	                  }	              )	          )	      })]~>$merge()	  )

(	      $now_str := $now();	      $today := $string($number($now('[F1]','-0300'))%7);	      $time := $number($now('[H]','-0300'))*60+$number($now('[m]','-0300'));		      $inTimeRange := function($startAt, $endAt){	          (	              $ls := $number($substringBefore($startAt,':'))*60+$number($substringAfter($startAt,':'));	              $le := $number($substringBefore($endAt,':'))*60+$number($substringAfter($endAt,':'));	              $le > $ls ?	                  $time >= $ls and ($le = 1439 or $time < $le)	              :	                  $time >= $ls or $time < $le	          )	      };		      $preserveTime := function($ruleKey, $cloudId){	          (	              $p := $lookup($lookup(payload, $ruleKey), $cloudId);	              $type($p) = "object" and $p.triggered = false and $type($p.time) = "string" ?	                  $p.time	              :	              (	                  $d := $lookup($lookup(data, $ruleKey), $cloudId);	                  $type($d) = "object" and $d.triggered = false and $type($d.time) = "string" ?	                      $d.time	                  :	                      $now_str	              )	          )	      };		      [$each(rules, function($v, $k){	          (	              $active := $lookup($v.daysOfWeek, $today) and $inTimeRange($v.startAt, $v.endAt);	              $exist := $lookup(payload, $k);		              {	                  $k: $active and $type($exist) = "object" ?	                      $exist	                  :	                      [$each($v.slaves, function($va, $ka){	                          (	                              $status := $lookup(slaves, 'sl_'&$ka).status;	                              {	                                  $va.cloud_id: {	                                      "triggered": false,	                                      "value": "Out of Rule Range",	                                      "values": [],	                                      "alldata": [],	                                      "time": $preserveTime($k, $va.cloud_id),	                                      "local_id": $ka,	                                      "status": $type($status) = "string" ? $status : "offline"	                                  }	                              }	                          )	                      })]~>$merge()	              }	          )	      })]~>$merge()	  )

name: Get slaves
query:
SELECT id
FROM slaves

name: Get slaves
query:
SELECT *
FROM slaves
Where id = 129

name: Get slaves
query:
SELECT id, name, "type"
FROM slaves

name: Get channels
Get channels
query:
SELECT slave_id
FROM channels
WHERE name ILIKE '%idr%'
AND slave_id IN ({{msg.water}})

name: Get water
query:
SELECT 
    slave_id, 
    MAX(value) AS max_value
FROM Channel_pulse_log

WHERE 
slave_id IN ({{msg.water}})
AND timestamp BETWEEN '{{msg.time.start}}' AND '{{msg.time.end}}'

GROUP BY slave_id;

name: Get energy
query:
SELECT 
    slave_id, 
    MAX(value) AS max_value
FROM consumption_realtime

WHERE 
slave_id IN ({{msg.pot3f}})
AND timestamp BETWEEN '{{msg.time.start}}' AND '{{msg.time.end}}'

GROUP BY slave_id;

name: Get energy
query:
SELECT 
    slave_id, 
    MAX(value) AS max_value
FROM consumption_realtime

WHERE 
slave_id IN ({{msg.potsw}})
AND timestamp BETWEEN '{{msg.time.start}}' AND '{{msg.time.end}}'

GROUP BY slave_id;

name: Get temp
query:
SELECT 
    slave_id, 
    AVG(value) AS media_value
FROM temperature_history

WHERE 
slave_id IN ({{msg.temp}})
AND timestamp BETWEEN '{{msg.time.start}}' AND '{{msg.time.end}}'

GROUP BY slave_id;

rules.to: (	$aux:=	[$map(payload, function($v){	    {$string($v.id):{"status":$v.status, "name":$v.name}}	})]~>$merge();		{	    "pot3f": [$each(pot3f, function($v,$k){	        (	            $slave:=$lookup($aux, $k);	            $slave.name & "  |  ID " & $k & "  |  " & $slave.status & "  |  " & "POT "&$v	        )	    })],	    "water": [$each(water, function($v,$k){	        (	            $slave:=$lookup($aux, $k);	            $slave.name & "  |  ID " & $k & "  |  " & $slave.status & "  |  " & "Hidr "&$v	        )	    })],	    "potscd": [$each(potscd, function($v,$k){	        (	            $slave:=$lookup($aux, $k);	            $slave.name & "  |  ID " & $k & "  |  " & $slave.status & "  |  " & "SCD "&$v	        )	    })],	    "temp": [$each(temp, function($v,$k){	        (	            $slave:=$lookup($aux, $k);	            $slave.name & "  |  ID " & $k & "  |  " & $slave.status & "  |  " & "Temp "&$v	        )	    })]	}		)
